places.name: Coal Drops Yard
places.summary: Canalside cluster with retail, restaurants, and strong demo-friendly foot traffic near Granary Square.

places.name: Spiritland
places.summary: Listening bar energy that turns a food-first route into a music-led evening without leaving the core district.

places.name: Canopy Market
places.summary: Flexible market stop that works well for browsing, quick bites, and anchoring a shorter route.

places.name: Gasholder Park
places.summary: Quiet canalside pause with a strong visual contrast to the station and retail cluster.

places.name: KX Roof Garden
places.summary: Compact elevated green stop that gives the route a calmer checkpoint near the busiest pedestrian flows.

places.name: Lina Stores
places.summary: Reliable food anchor for a mid-budget route, close enough to pull the graph back toward the station edge.

places.name: KOKO
places.summary: High-energy outlier that stretches the route beyond King's Cross when the user wants a stronger night-out finish.

places.name: British Library
places.summary: Cultural anchor on the St Pancras edge that broadens the route beyond food and nightlife without blowing the budget.
